LFFKings & Priest
Tabernacle
Who We Are

A Family Built on Faith and Purpose

Living Faith Foundation, Kings & Priest Tabernacle is a vibrant, Spirit-filled assembly at 37 Road, Behind Sawmill, 3rd Avenue, Gwarinpa, Abuja. We are part of Living Faith Foundation, headquartered at Alheri Prayer Village, Km 31, Abuja-Kaduna Expressway, Kaduna.

Our mission: to reach every soul with the Gospel in the power of the Holy Ghost, disciple believers, and send them out to transform their world.

🙋

Spirit-Led Worship

Every Sunday, we encounter God through authentic, anointed praise and worship.

📚

Word-Based Teaching

Rooted in Scripture. Our Bible Studies and Sunday messages equip you for life.

❤

Community and Care

We are a family. From children to seniors, everyone belongs and everyone matters.

Our Leadership

Shepherding the Flock with Love and Vision

Pastor Matthew Oloyede
District Pastor

Pastor Matthew Oloyede shepherds the Kings & Priest Tabernacle assembly with love, vision, and a passion for seeing every life transformed by the power of the Holy Ghost.

Rev. P.J.A. Olaiya
President, Living Faith Foundation

Rev. Olaiya leads the entire Living Faith Foundation movement. Headquarters at Alheri Prayer Village, Km 31, Abuja-Kaduna Expressway, Kaduna.
